name: lemma_aligned_iff_eq_mul_div_external_body
reason: `lemma_aligned_iff_eq_mul_div` is `external_body` — the equivalence between `a % b == 0` and `a == b * (a / b)` is trusted without proof

name: aligned_transitive_verified
code:
proof fn phi_2_aligned_transitive_verified(a: nat, b: nat, c: nat)
    requires
        0 < b,
        0 < c,
        aligned(a, b),
        aligned(b, c),
    ensures
        aligned(a, c),
{
    aligned_transitive(a, b, c);
}
reason: Transitivity of alignment depends on the external_body `lemma_aligned_iff_eq_mul_div` — the proof is verified but its foundation is unverified

name: aligned_mul_div_roundtrip
